reason: SSH to pdx1-shared-a2-06.dreamhost.com blocked by cloud environment network policy (port 22 timeout after CONNECT). Cannot read ~/artonly.io/data/pinterest-token.txt or ~/artonly.io/data/pinterest-config.json.

posts_would_pin.title: Ama Dropped the Alias and Kept Everything That Mattered
Toast Made Koffee Famous. Gifted Made the Argument She Actually Wanted.
PJ Morton Made Peace Between Saturday Night and Sunday Morning

resolution_needed: Pinterest token and board_id must be accessible without SSH. Options: (1) Expose ~/artonly.io/data/pinterest-token.txt via a protected HTTPS endpoint on artonly.io/api/. (2) Store token + board_id as env vars in the Claude Code session settings. (3) Add pinterest-config.json to the vossadvisory GitHub repo. Same root cause as the blocked newsletter and Bluesky runs.
note: Post JSON files at artonly.io/posts/*.json ARE accessible via HTTPS. Pinterest API calls (api.pinterest.com) ARE reachable through the cloud proxy. Only the token is missing.
